## tscli delete device

Delete device commands

### Synopsis

Delete devices from the Tailscale API

```
tscli delete device [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --device string   Device ID to get (nodeId "node-abc123" or numeric id). Example: --device=node-abcdef123456
  -h, --help            help for device
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [human json pretty yaml]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```
